name: speckit-autopilot
description: Autonomous Spec Kit orchestrator: ship full products and individual features with AI-driven spec-first iteration
author: speckit-autopilot contributors

skills.name: bootstrap-product
skills.description: Read docs/product.md and produce roadmap, backlog and initial autopilot state. Does NOT implement any code.

skills.name: ship-product
skills.description: Iteratively implement every feature in the backlog using Spec Kit, one feature at a time until completion or a blocking error.

skills.name: ship-feature
skills.description: Implement a single feature (greenfield or brownfield) using the full Spec Kit workflow.

skills.name: resume-loop
skills.description: Resume interrupted autopilot work by re-reading state files. Safe after /compact or session restart.

skills.name: status
skills.description: Show a concise status report: active feature, current phase, backlog summary, last error, test/coverage results.

agents.name: product-planner
agents.description: Analyses docs/product.md and produces structured roadmap and backlog artifacts

agents.name: brownfield-analyst
agents.description: Inspects an existing repository and produces docs/brownfield-snapshot.md

agents.name: spec-auditor
agents.description: Audits spec artifacts for completeness, ambiguity and consistency

agents.name: qa-gatekeeper
agents.description: Checks acceptance criteria, test results and coverage before marking a feature done
